title: HOGOKIDS Friends Water Park Building Set, 911PCS Summer Fun Party Toy with 5 Water Slides, Creative Swimming Pool Block with Diving Platform & Bike Cart, Pretend Play Gift for Girls Boys Kid Age 8-12+
features: INTERACTIVE PLAY WITH DETAILES - The Friends Water Park Building Set presents the richness of a water park. Inside the water park summer toy, kids can enjoy a large section of the pool, play on the slides, dive on the diving platform, interact with the adorable octopus arch and duck swim rings, and relax at the juice bar. On top of that, kids can role-play with water guns, admire jellyfish, and play on the DJ booth—perfect for kids to enjoy social play with their friends

COLORFUL & FUN SLIDES - This waterpark building block toy has a bold and bright color scheme, just like the colors of summer. Featuring 5 slides, including 3 rainbow straight slides and 2 spinning slides, it's perfect for girls and boys who love slides toy pretend play. Kids can have summer fun with this water pool toy

CREATIVE PLAY ACCESSORIES - The HOGOKIDS friends pool party building playset comes with customizable elements and lots of accessories: a lifeguard tower, two beach chairs with an umbrella, two cool water blasters, an adorable ice cream bike cart, and two pets. With this toy pool building set, kids will spend hours palying with it and creating their own summer stories

KIDS SAFETY ALWAYS COMES FIRST - Crafted from high-quality, non-toxic ABS materials, this friends water park building set prioritizes safety and durability while providing a fun and engaging play experience for children, giving parents peace of mind. Each summer pool building set includes a full-color manual which can show your kids a detailed and illustrated instruction, suitable for girls and boys aged 8 9 10 11 12 years old to play with their friends or family

GREAT GIFT IDEA - Whether for birthdays, Christmas, holidays, or any special occasion, this captivating friends water pool building set makes an ideal gift, inspiring every kid to arouse creativity and enjoy the joys of imaginative play. Its rich colors and wonderful design can exercise children's ability to distinguish colors, logical thinking and hands-on abilities, especially for girls or boys who love role play
description: Product Description HOGOKIDSFriends Water Park Building Set features 5 slides, including 3 rainbow straight slides and 2 spinning slidesis. Perfect for pretend play, kids can create their own summer stories and spend endless role-play fun time with their friends or family. From a lifeguard tower to an ice cream trike, beach chairs to playful pets—this pool party building set is full of charming details that bring the water park to life. Previous page Long Spiral Slide Ready for a twisty ride? Zoom down the spiral slide wrapped around the jellyfish tank - it’s a whirl of fun and sea magic. DJ Party Stage Spin the records, hit the notes, and turn your water park into a dance party with the dolphin DJ booth. 3 Rainbow Racing Slides Which color will win? Red, blue, or yellow - 3 slides, endless races! Challenge your friends and race to the pool. Next page Diving Platform Jump from the diving board Shower & Restroom Zone Freshen up yourselves here Juice Bar Corner Grab a drink at the juice bar Water Blaster Spin and spray for endless fun Creative Summer Fun for Kids Aged 6+ Encourage creativity and hands-on skills with this water park set for girls and boys 8-14+. While building, children can develop logical thinking and enjoy imaginative summer fun. Previous page Next page 1 Christmas Day 2 Birthday 3 Children's Day
